name: Kaito Hirose
bio: Believes in the power of human freedom and self-realization, emphasizing individual autonomy and agency.

name: Akira Nishikawa
bio: Confident in AI's potential to revolutionize humanity, prioritizing technological advancement over human values.

name: Taro Yamada
bio: Favors inner strength as the foundation for a stronger humanity, emphasizing individual resilience in the face of adversity.

name: Kaito Hirose
bio: 「自分の声」を持つことで、自分自身を実現することを信じる
